items.title: Tenerife Futures
items.description: Scenario sketches for land use, water, and tourism on a volcanic Atlantic island.
items.author: anselm

items.title: MENA Warming — 2049
items.description: Accelerated surface temperature rise in the Middle East and North Africa. Desert regions warm at Arctic rates because no soil moisture buffers the CO₂ forcing.
items.author: anselm

items.title: Tuvalu Baseline
items.description: Freshwater lens, coral reef, fishery, and population dynamics on a low-lying island under sustained sea-level pressure.
items.author: anselm

items.title: Agent Library
items.description: Reusable agent definitions for ecological and climate simulations.
items.author: anselm
